'''Militar''' was the seventh [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Metellos system/Legends|Metellos system]], a [[Star system/Legends|star system]]<ref name="Core" /> in the [[Corusca sector/Legends|Corusca sector]]<ref name="sector" /> of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. It was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] with five [[Moon/Legends|moons]].<ref name="Core" />

*<!-- 2003-01-XX -->''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'' {{1stm}}
